meta.title: Features
meta.description: Discover Nostr WoT features: NIP-07 signer, multi-account vault, NIP-46 remote signer, Lightning wallet, profile & relay management, and privacy-first design.

hero.title: Identity & Wallet,
hero.description: A complete Nostr identity provider and Lightning wallet. Manage multiple accounts, sign events, encrypt messages, send zaps, and keep your profile, relays, and mute list in sync — with granular per-site permissions.

extensionOverview.title: Identity, wallet, and profile — one extension
extensionOverview.description: Everything you need for Nostr in a single install. No juggling multiple extensions.

signer.title: NIP-07 Signer
signer.description: Sign events and encrypt messages (NIP-04 & NIP-44) across any Nostr client

vault.title: Encrypted Vault
vault.description: AES-256-GCM encrypted key storage with auto-lock and secure backup

multiAccount.title: Multi-Account
multiAccount.description: HD derivation, watch-only, NIP-46 remote signer — switch identities instantly

wallet.title: Lightning Wallet
wallet.description: Built-in wallet for zaps with NWC, LNbits, or one-click quick setup

badges.title: Profile & Relays
badges.description: Edit your kind:0 profile and manage NIP-65 relays and your NIP-51 mute list

permissions.title: Granular Permissions
permissions.description: Per-account, per-domain, per-method controls with activity logging

webln.title: WebLN Provider
webln.description: Sites can request payments via window.webln with your approval

i18n.title: 6 Languages
i18n.description: English, Spanish, Portuguese, German, French, and Italian

universalApi.title: One signer, available on every Nostr website
universalApi.description: Once installed, any Nostr app can call window.nostr to get your public key, sign events, and encrypt messages — without ever touching your private key. Web of Trust queries live in the nostr-wot SDK and Oracle, not the extension.

chooseSource.title: Three ways to bring your identity

remote.title: Create New Keys
remote.description: Generate a fresh keypair in seconds. HD-derived and encrypted in the vault from the start.
remote.bestFor: New users starting fresh on Nostr

local.title: Import nsec
local.description: Already have keys? Paste your nsec or seed and the extension takes over signing locally.

hybrid.title: NIP-46 Remote Signer
hybrid.description: Keep keys on a bunker or remote signer. The extension routes signing requests without holding the key.

trustScoring.title: Not every site gets the same access
trustScoring.description: Define what each app is allowed to do

distance.title: Permission Scopes
distance.description: Grants are scoped as narrowly as you like:

bonuses.title: Approval Modes
bonuses.description: Decide how much you get asked:

example.title: Example:
example.description: Your private keys are sealed with AES-256-GCM and a key derived from your password via PBKDF2 (210,000 iterations).

relays.title: Relay List (NIP-65)
relays.description: Choose your read and write relays:

blocklist.title: Muted Pubkeys
blocklist.description: Hide accounts across compatible clients by publishing a NIP-51 mute list.

trustlist.title: Muted Words
trustlist.description: Filter out topics and phrases you'd rather not see.

visualize.title: Account Switcher
visualize.description: Hold multiple identities and switch the active signer instantly

wallet.title: Zaps built in. No extra apps needed.
wallet.description: Send sats, receive zaps, and manage your balance without leaving the extension. Three ways to connect:

quickSetup.title: Quick Setup
quickSetup.description: Get a wallet in one click — no manual configuration. Good for getting started with zaps fast.

nwc.title: Nostr Wallet Connect
nwc.description: Paste your NWC URI to connect any external Lightning wallet you already use.

lnbits.title: LNbits
lnbits.description: Connect your LNbits instance with an admin key for direct API access.

webln.title: WebLN Provider
webln.description: The extension injects window.webln so Nostr apps can request payments automatically — with your permission.

autoApprove.title: Auto-approve small payments
autoApprove.description: Set a threshold in sats. Payments below it get approved automatically — no popup for every zap.

remote.title: Local Custody
remote.description: Private keys are encrypted and never sent anywhere

features.noContent: No key ever leaves the vault

local.title: No Tracking
local.description: The extension phones home to no one

install.title: Install extension
install.description: Add to Chrome, Firefox, or Brave

pubkey.title: Set up your account
pubkey.description: Create new keys, import nsec, add watch-only, or connect via NIP-46

mode.title: Secure your vault
mode.description: Set a password and auto-lock timer

scoring.title: Set site permissions
scoring.description: Choose what each app can sign and approve requests

browse.title: Browse Nostr
browse.description: Your identity and wallet follow you everywhere

pricing.title: Free. Forever. Open source.
pricing.description: Fork the extension, use the SDK, or self-host the Oracle — do whatever you want.
